meta.title: haru - Meet global friends & partners through voice
meta.description: Global dating through voice. Messages auto-translate and play back in your own voice—meet friends and partners with no language barrier.

hero.eyebrow: Meet friends & partners worldwide by voice
hero.title: First impressions, met by voice
hero.subtitle:
Swipe through profiles and listen to each person's voice.
Feel the mood and tone behind the photo, and discover their real charm.
hero.imageAlt: haru Discover screen — listening to someone's voice intro on a profile card

features.eyebrow: Three things that make haru, haru
features.title: Start with a voice, stay for the connection

art.title: Your very own art profile
art.body: haru turns your real photos into an art profile that's all yours — a spoonful of mood and two spoonfuls of charm. If showing real photos always made you hesitate, start comfortably with an art profile instead.
art.imageAlt: haru profile screen — photos rendered in a warm illustrated style

translate.title: Talk with no language wall
translate.body: Send a message and it reaches them auto-translated into their language — delivered in your own voice. No separate translator app, just chat naturally inside haru.
translate.imageAlt: haru chat screen — a message translated into the other person's language

emotion.title: Voice messages that carry feeling
emotion.body: When you send a message, pick an emotion like joy or sadness and it rides right in your voice's tone — even a 'lol' comes alive as real laughter.
emotion.imageAlt: haru chat screen — sending a message with emotion in the voice

voiceintro.title: A line you want them to hear
voiceintro.body: Pick a line you'd like to share or write your own, and it's auto-generated in your own voice. It appears next to your profile photo on the Discover tab.
voiceintro.imageAlt: haru voice intro screen — a chosen line synthesized in your own voice

recommend.title: Who haru is for
recommend.imageAlt: haru matching preferences screen — choosing preferred age, gender, and nationality
items: Anyone hoping to meet someone new from Korea, Japan, and beyond
Anyone who wants to exchange languages with people abroad
Anyone whose ideal type is a great voice
Anyone who wants to show off their own voice
Anyone who feels uneasy showing real photos

download.title: Start with haru today
download.description: Get haru on the App Store and Google Play.
download.ageNote: Must be 18 or older to use haru.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — haru
privacy.description: How haru collects, uses, retains, and shares your data with third parties.

terms.title: Terms of Service — haru
terms.description: Terms of use, member obligations, content moderation, and liability for haru.

accountDeletion.title: Account Deletion — haru
accountDeletion.description: How to delete your haru account and what data is removed, retained, or anonymized.

childSafety.title: Child Safety Standards Policy — haru
childSafety.description: haru's standards against child sexual abuse and exploitation (CSAE), how to report, and our age policy.

legal.localeNotice: Only the Korean source text is currently available. Translations will be provided after launch.

authCallback.title: Your email has been verified
authCallback.body: Head back to the haru app and sign in.
